title: Term
text: This Agreement shall commence on {{effective_date}} and shall continue for a period of {{occupancy_term}} unless earlier terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof. On expiry of the term, this Agreement shall not be automatically renewed and the Licensee/Tenant shall be required to vacate the Premises and hand over peaceful possession to the Licensor/Landlord. Any holding over by the Licensee/Tenant after expiry of the term without the written consent of the Licensor/Landlord shall be on a month-to-month basis at the same terms and conditions and terminable by either Party on fifteen (15) days' written notice.
name: Term

legal_basis.note: Duration of certain leases — month-to-month for no fixed term

jurisdiction_constraints.general: Leases for >12 months require compulsory registration (Registration Act 1908 S.17); standard practice is 11-month leave & licence to avoid registration

dispute_hotspots: 11-month renewal cycle — parties assume renewal but no formal renewal signed
Holdover tenancy — what happens when tenant stays beyond lease term
Month-to-month tenancy under TPA S.106 — 15 days notice required to end
